summary: 4-phase TDD plan for fold/unfold formula normalization: Phase 1 implements unfold_formula (recursive expansion of 11 enriched tags to 6 primitives), Phase 2 implements fold_formula (outside-in pattern matching with Level 3->1 ordering and overlapping pattern disambiguation), Phase 3 implements normalize_formula (level-based fold/unfold) and exports, Phase 4 adds property-based round-trip tests for 100+ random formulas. Total effort: 3.5 hours.
